requirement_topic.zh: 国家照明能效计划（乌兹别克斯坦）
requirement_topic.zht: 國家照明能效計劃（烏茲別克）

summary.en: Uzbekistan pursues energy-efficiency policy for lighting products through national programmes and technical regulations administered in coordination with O'zStandart (the Uzbek Agency for Technical Regulation) and the relevant energy authorities, rather than through a single EU-style Ecodesign regulation. The practical effect for LED lamps and luminaires is that products may need to demonstrate minimum performance（efficacy in lm/W, declared luminous flux, rated lifetime, power consumption）against applicable O'zDSt standards adopting IEC performance methods, and energy-related declarations may be required at certification or import. Because Uzbekistan structures this through programmes and O'zDSt-adopted standards （not a consolidated Ecodesign regulation with fixed Annex II thresholds）, the exact mandatory minimums and their applicability must be verified for the specific product category against current Uzbekistan technical regulation at the time of export.
summary.zh: 乌兹别克斯坦通过国家计划及技术法规推行照明产品能效政策，由 O'zStandart（乌兹别克技术法规署）与相关能源主管部门协调管理，而非通过单一欧盟式生态设计法规。对 LED 灯及灯具的实际影响是：产品可能须依据采用 IEC 性能方法的适用 O'zDSt 标准证明最低性能（光效 lm/W、标称光通量、额定寿命、功耗），并可能在认证或进口时要求能效相关声明。由于乌兹别克斯坦通过计划及 O'zDSt 采纳标准（而非具有固定附件 II 阈值的统一生态设计法规）来构建此项制度，确切的强制最低值及其适用性须针对具体产品类别、依据出口时现行乌兹别克斯坦技术法规予以核实。
summary.zht: 烏茲別克通過國家計劃及技術法規推行照明產品能效政策，由 O'zStandart（烏茲別克技術法規署）與相關能源主管部門協調管理，而非通過單一歐盟式生態設計法規。對 LED 燈及燈具的實際影響是：產品可能須依據採用 IEC 性能方法的適用 O'zDSt 標準證明最低性能（光效 lm/W、標稱光通量、額定壽命、功耗），並可能在認證或進口時要求能效相關聲明。由於烏茲別克通過計劃及 O'zDSt 採納標準（而非具有固定附件 II 閾值的統一生態設計法規）來構建此項制度，確切的強制最低值及其適用性須針對具體產品類別、依據出口時現行烏茲別克技術法規予以核實。

standards_or_laws: Uzbekistan national energy-efficiency programmes for lighting (administered with O'zStandart and energy authorities)
Applicable O'zDSt standards adopting IEC performance/measurement methods for LED lamps and luminaires

summary.en: China's equivalent is GB 30255 (Minimum allowable values of energy efficiency and energy efficiency grades for LED luminaires / room luminaires). It defines energy-efficiency grades by absolute luminous efficacy （lm/W）, with the lowest grade as the minimum for market entry, and mandatory China Energy Label （CEL）registration administered by SAMR. GB 30255 covers efficacy grading and is paired with GB 7000 series for luminaire safety, but energy requirements are framed as Chinese national grades rather than mapped to Uzbekistan's programme-based approach.
summary.zh: 中国对应标准为 GB 30255（LED 灯具/室内照明产品能效限定值及能效等级）。它依据绝对光效（lm/W）划分能效等级，以最低等级作为市场准入最低要求，并由市场监管总局（SAMR）管理强制性中国能效标识（CEL）注册。GB 30255 涵盖能效分级，并与 GB 7000 系列（灯具安全）配套，但能效要求以中国国家等级形式确立，未对应乌兹别克斯坦基于计划的方式。
summary.zht: 中國對應標準為 GB 30255（LED 燈具/室內照明產品能效限定值及能效等級）。它依據絕對光效（lm/W）劃分能效等級，以最低等級作為市場准入最低要求，並由市場監管總局（SAMR）管理強制性中國能效標識（CEL）注冊。GB 30255 涵蓋能效分級，並與 GB 7000 系列（燈具安全）配套，但能效要求以中國國家等級形式確立，未對應烏茲別克基於計劃的方式。

standards_or_laws: GB 30255 — Energy efficiency limits and grades for LED luminaires (SAC/SAMR)
China Energy Label (CEL) scheme — administered by SAMR

gap.en: Unlike the EU's single Ecodesign Regulation with fixed Annex II thresholds, Uzbekistan structures lighting energy efficiency through national programmes and O'zDSt-adopted standards, so there is no one-to-one threshold to cross-map from China's GB 30255 grades. A product meeting a given GB 30255 grade is not automatically deemed compliant in Uzbekistan: the manufacturer must (1) identify the applicable Uzbekistan energy-efficiency programme requirement for the specific product category; (2) demonstrate performance against the O'zDSt-adopted IEC measurement methods rather than GB methods; and (3) provide any energy-related declarations required at O'zStandart certification or import. China's CEL registration has no recognition in Uzbekistan.
gap.zh: 与欧盟具有固定附件 II 阈值的单一生态设计法规不同，乌兹别克斯坦通过国家计划及 O'zDSt 采纳标准来构建照明能效，因此不存在可与中国 GB 30255 等级一一对应的阈值。满足某一 GB 30255 等级的产品在乌兹别克斯坦不自动视为合规：制造商须（1）确定适用于具体产品类别的乌兹别克斯坦能效计划要求；（2）依据 O'zDSt 采纳的 IEC 测量方法（而非 GB 方法）证明性能；（3）在 O'zStandart 认证或进口时提供所需的能效相关声明。中国 CEL 注册在乌兹别克斯坦不被认可。
gap.zht: 與歐盟具有固定附件 II 閾值的單一生態設計法規不同，烏茲別克通過國家計劃及 O'zDSt 採納標準來構建照明能效，因此不存在可與中國 GB 30255 等級一一對應的閾值。滿足某一 GB 30255 等級的產品在烏茲別克不自動視為合規：製造商須（1）確定適用於具體產品類別的烏茲別克能效計劃要求；（2）依據 O'zDSt 採納的 IEC 測量方法（而非 GB 方法）證明性能；（3）在 O'zStandart 認證或進口時提供所需的能效相關聲明。中國 CEL 注冊在烏茲別克不被認可。

mandatory_status.target: Programme-dependent — energy-efficiency requirements for lighting arise through Uzbekistan national programmes and applicable O'zDSt standards; verify the specific mandatory minimum for the product category against current Uzbekistan technical regulation
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory (minimum grade) — GB 30255 lowest energy-efficiency grade is the minimum for CN market entry; China Energy Label registration required

source.publisher: O'zStandart — Uzbek Agency for Technical Regulation

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Uzbekistan addresses LED lighting energy efficiency through national programmes and O'zDSt-adopted standards rather than a single EU-style Ecodesign regulation, so there is no direct threshold cross-map from China's GB 30255 grades. Verify the applicable energy-efficiency requirement for the specific product category against current Uzbekistan technical regulation, demonstrate performance via O'zDSt/IEC methods, and provide required energy declarations at O'zStandart certification or import. China's CEL registration is not recognised.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 乌兹别克斯坦通过国家计划及 O'zDSt 采纳标准（而非单一欧盟式生态设计法规）处理 LED 照明能效，故不存在与中国 GB 30255 等级的直接阈值对应。请针对具体产品类别、依据现行乌兹别克斯坦技术法规核实适用的能效要求，依据 O'zDSt/IEC 方法证明性能，并在 O'zStandart 认证或进口时提供所需能效声明。中国 CEL 注册不被认可。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 烏茲別克通過國家計劃及 O'zDSt 採納標準（而非單一歐盟式生態設計法規）處理 LED 照明能效，故不存在與中國 GB 30255 等級的直接閾值對應。請針對具體產品類別、依據現行烏茲別克技術法規核實適用的能效要求，依據 O'zDSt/IEC 方法證明性能，並在 O'zStandart 認證或進口時提供所需能效聲明。中國 CEL 註冊不被認可。

requirement_topic.en: Energy/Performance Marking and Declarations at Import (Uzbekistan)
requirement_topic.zh: 进口时的能效/性能标识与声明（乌兹别克斯坦）
requirement_topic.zht: 進口時的能效/性能標識與聲明（烏茲別克）

summary.en: Where Uzbekistan's energy-efficiency programmes or applicable O'zDSt standards require it, LED lamps and luminaires may need to carry declared performance information （rated power, luminous flux, efficacy, rated lifetime, colour temperature/CRI as applicable）and any required energy/performance marking on packaging and product documentation in a form acceptable to O'zStandart and to customs at import. The in-country importer typically holds the conformity certificate or declaration and is responsible for ensuring the product as placed on the market carries the required declarations. Unlike the EU there is no single mandatory rescaled A-G energy label tied to an EPREL-type registry; declarations are framed by the applicable O'zDSt standard and programme requirement, so verify the exact marking/declaration content required for the product category.
summary.zh: 在乌兹别克斯坦能效计划或适用 O'zDSt 标准有所要求时，LED 灯及灯具可能须以 O'zStandart 及进口海关可接受的形式，在包装及产品文件上载明性能信息（额定功率、光通量、光效、额定寿命，以及适用的色温/显色指数）及所需的能效/性能标识。在地进口商通常持有合格证书或声明，并负责确保投放市场的产品载明所需声明。与欧盟不同，乌兹别克斯坦没有与 EPREL 类注册系统挂钩的单一强制重新调整 A-G 能效标签；声明由适用 O'zDSt 标准及计划要求确立，故须核实产品类别所需的确切标识/声明内容。
summary.zht: 在烏茲別克能效計劃或適用 O'zDSt 標準有所要求時，LED 燈及燈具可能須以 O'zStandart 及進口海關可接受的形式，在包裝及產品文件上載明性能信息（額定功率、光通量、光效、額定壽命，以及適用的色溫/顯色指數）及所需的能效/性能標識。在地進口商通常持有合格證書或聲明，並負責確保投放市場的產品載明所需聲明。與歐盟不同，烏茲別克沒有與 EPREL 類註冊系統掛鈎的單一強制重新調整 A-G 能效標籤；聲明由適用 O'zDSt 標準及計劃要求確立，故須核實產品類別所需的確切標識/聲明內容。

standards_or_laws: Applicable Uzbekistan energy-efficiency programme marking/declaration requirements for lighting
Applicable O'zDSt standards adopting IEC marking/declared-value provisions for LED lamps and luminaires

summary.en: In China the China Energy Label （CEL）under GB 30255 is a mandatory energy label registered with the designated body before affixing, showing the energy-efficiency grade based on absolute lm/W. Product marking and declared values also follow GB 7000 series （safety）and GB 30255 （efficiency）. The CEL is a Chinese national label with no mutual recognition in Uzbekistan, and its grade scale does not map onto Uzbekistan's programme/standard-based declarations.
summary.zh: 在中国，依据 GB 30255 的中国能效标识（CEL）为强制性能效标签，须在贴附前向指定机构注册，依据绝对 lm/W 显示能效等级。产品标识及标称值还遵循 GB 7000 系列（安全）及 GB 30255（能效）。CEL 为中国国家标签，在乌兹别克斯坦无互认，其等级标度不能对应乌兹别克斯坦基于计划/标准的声明。
summary.zht: 在中國，依據 GB 30255 的中國能效標識（CEL）為強制性能效標籤，須在貼附前向指定機構註冊，依據絕對 lm/W 顯示能效等級。產品標識及標稱值還遵循 GB 7000 系列（安全）及 GB 30255（能效）。CEL 為中國國家標籤，在烏茲別克無互認，其等級標度不能對應烏茲別克基於計劃/標準的聲明。

standards_or_laws: GB 30255 — Energy efficiency limits and grades for LED luminaires; China Energy Label (CEL) scheme (SAMR)
GB 7000 series — Luminaire marking and safety requirements (SAC/SAMR)

gap.en: China's CEL is a registered national energy label with a fixed grade scale; Uzbekistan has no equivalent single rescaled energy label or EPREL-type registry, and its marking/declaration obligations flow from the applicable O'zDSt standard and energy programme. Practical gaps for a Chinese exporter: (1) the CEL and its grade are not accepted in Uzbekistan — declared values must instead be presented per O'zDSt/IEC methods and in the language/format O'zStandart and customs accept; (2) the in-country importer, not the Chinese manufacturer, typically holds the certificate/declaration and bears the on-market declaration duty; (3) the exact required marking content differs by product category and must be confirmed against current Uzbekistan technical regulation rather than assumed from EU or China practice.
gap.zh: 中国 CEL 是具有固定等级标度的已注册国家能效标签；乌兹别克斯坦没有等效的单一重新调整能效标签或 EPREL 类注册系统，其标识/声明义务源自适用 O'zDSt 标准及能效计划。中国出口商的实际差距：（1）CEL 及其等级在乌兹别克斯坦不被接受——标称值须改为依据 O'zDSt/IEC 方法、并以 O'zStandart 及海关接受的语言/格式呈现；（2）通常由在地进口商（而非中国制造商）持有证书/声明并承担市场声明义务；（3）确切所需标识内容因产品类别而异，须依据现行乌兹别克斯坦技术法规确认，而非沿用欧盟或中国做法。
gap.zht: 中國 CEL 是具有固定等級標度的已註冊國家能效標籤；烏茲別克沒有等效的單一重新調整能效標籤或 EPREL 類註冊系統，其標識/聲明義務源自適用 O'zDSt 標準及能效計劃。中國出口商的實際差距：（1）CEL 及其等級在烏茲別克不被接受——標稱值須改為依據 O'zDSt/IEC 方法、並以 O'zStandart 及海關接受的語言/格式呈現；（2）通常由在地進口商（而非中國製造商）持有證書/聲明並承擔市場聲明義務；（3）確切所需標識內容因產品類別而異，須依據現行烏茲別克技術法規確認，而非沿用歐盟或中國做法。

mandatory_status.target: Programme/standard-dependent — declared performance values and any required energy/performance marking follow applicable O'zDSt standards and Uzbekistan energy programmes; in-country importer typically responsible; verify exact content for the product category
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — China Energy Label (CEL) registration and GB 30255/GB 7000 marking required before CN market placement

source.publisher: O'zStandart — Uzbek Agency for Technical Regulation

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Uzbekistan has no single rescaled A-G energy label or EPREL-type registry; energy/performance marking and declared values follow the applicable O'zDSt standard and national energy programme, and the in-country importer typically carries the on-market declaration duty. China's CEL is not recognised. Confirm the exact required marking/declaration content for the product category against current Uzbekistan technical regulation before shipment.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 乌兹别克斯坦没有单一重新调整 A-G 能效标签或 EPREL 类注册系统；能效/性能标识及标称值遵循适用 O'zDSt 标准及国家能效计划，且通常由在地进口商承担市场声明义务。中国 CEL 不被认可。出货前请依据现行乌兹别克斯坦技术法规确认产品类别所需的确切标识/声明内容。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 烏茲別克沒有單一重新調整 A-G 能效標籤或 EPREL 類註冊系統；能效/性能標識及標稱值遵循適用 O'zDSt 標準及國家能效計劃，且通常由在地進口商承擔市場聲明義務。中國 CEL 不被認可。出貨前請依據現行烏茲別克技術法規確認產品類別所需的確切標識/聲明內容。
